title: cyathea retanae
intro: Cyathea retanae, also known as the Philippine tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea retanae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Cyathea retanae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
